articles.summary: Israel arrests five women activists in the occupied West Bank The  Israeli  army arrested five women activists in the  occupied West Bank  early on Wednesday morning. articles.title: Israel threatens third attack on Iran despite diplomacy
articles.summary: Israel threatens third attack on Iran despite diplomacy Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz says Israel could attack Iran again “if it deems it necessary”, despite continuing US efforts to pursue diplomacy. articles.title: Airlines told to avoid Iraq and Lebanon airspace
articles.summary: Airlines told to avoid Iraq and Lebanon airspace The European Union Aviation Safety Agency has warned airlines against using flight routes over Iraq and Lebanon, citing uncertainty over the US-Iran ceasefire and the risk of rapid escalation. The agency said it had extended its conflict-zone advisory for the region until 8 July, after previously keeping the warning in place until 1 July.
